summary:
NEW PATRIOTISM AND ELECTION VISIONS: Brandon describes a vision of a rising wave of patriotism spreading across the United States, specifically mentioning Michigan and Oklahoma where people carry fire-like torches. Brandon recounts witnessing an assassination attempt on Donald Trump where a bullet severely damages his eardrum. Following this event, Brandon states that Trump experiences a profound religious conversion and dedication to his Christian faith. Brandon also foresees Trump facing significant legal challenges and persecution from judges through the summer, which resolve by the fall, ultimately leading to Trump winning the presidential election as patriots mobilize to vote.

ECONOMIC CRASH AND NATIONAL RESTORATION: Brandon shares a vision of a severe economic collapse, described as worse than the Great Depression, bringing a dark period to the nation. During this financial crisis, Brandon sees Trump and various officials pacing and praying fervently inside the Oval Office. According to Brandon, this intense intercession results in the heavy darkness lifting from the country, paving the way for a return to prosperous times. Brandon conveys a final message that this period of shaking and correction is not a destructive judgment, but rather the precursor to a great national revival in America.
rawData: [July 14, 2024]-[Prophecy that came to pass - Trump's ear]-[https://youtu.be/FCGfE9yMnXc]-[Amen. He said there's going to be a new wave of patriotism coming out, and that's whenever I saw Trump and a red wave coming out of Michigan. Then I saw Oklahoma, and there were embers of people, and they all had torches throughout Oklahoma. They were raising up these torches that looked like fire, and they were bringing forth a new patriotism upon the nation. It was being birthed and it just kept spreading like fire all throughout America. I saw Trump rising up, and then I saw an attempt on his life: this bullet flew by his ear and it came so close to his head that it busted his eardrum. He fell to his knees during this timeframe and he started worshiping the Lord. He got radically born again during this timeframe—I'm talking, people say he's saved now, but he becomes really on fire for Jesus from what I saw coming. Then I saw people interceding, and I saw him winning the presidency. The Lord showed me it would go clear into the summer; great persecution would come on him through the judges and through the law and all these people trying to sue him, but there would be a stop to it and things would start to break free toward the fall. Then I saw him winning the election through the patriots coming out and voting. Then there will be a great economic crash. I saw they had a great economic plan, a crash worse than the Great Depression. The Lord warned me about this; it would be a great dark time, but I saw paddles coming upon America's soil like a shocking of the soil. I saw Donald Trump praying in the Oval Office and he was weeping before the Lord with his hands on his head. There were ministers and people—I don't know if they were senators or congresspeople—I just saw them pacing back and forth inside of the White House, the Oval Office, and they were interceding all inside there. I could feel the presence of the Lord so strong on this. Then I could see that darkness, the heaviness upon America with the financial crisis I saw coming, started to lift above the trees and I saw the blue and the green times—good times—coming back again. But the Lord said it would be a season of a shaking, and it would be a shaking. In this, basically, he was not done with America; there would be a great revival. It's not all doom and gloom; that's what he said. 'The sky is not falling. It's just a time—people would say this is judgment,' and the Lord said, 'Do not call this judgment. It's not my judgment; it's a correction. There's a correction coming.]
